# AnimeChrono

> Community-curated anime watch orders and engagement platform.

AnimeChrono provides the definitive chronological and recommended watch orders for anime franchises. Each franchise has a master watch order maintained by the community, with numbered entries showing exactly when to watch movies, OVAs, ONAs, and specials between episode blocks.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://animechrono.com
- Chronicles (browse all franchises): https://animechrono.com/chronicles
- Discover (search anime): https://animechrono.com/discover
- Franchise watch order pages: https://animechrono.com/franchise/{slug}

## What You'll Find

- **Watch orders for 194+ anime franchises** — each page shows the complete chronological viewing order, including where to insert movies, OVAs, and specials between episode blocks
- **Entry types**: episodes, movies, OVAs, ONAs, specials, manga — each labeled by type
- **Community-maintained** — orders are proposed, voted on, and refined by the community
- **Essential vs optional markers** — entries are flagged as essential or skippable for newcomers

## Popular Franchises

- Naruto: https://animechrono.com/franchise/naruto
- One Piece: https://animechrono.com/franchise/one-piece
- Dragon Ball: https://animechrono.com/franchise/dragon-ball
- Bleach: https://animechrono.com/franchise/bleach
- Attack on Titan: https://animechrono.com/franchise/attack-on-titan
- Jujutsu Kaisen: https://animechrono.com/franchise/jujutsu-kaisen
- Demon Slayer: https://animechrono.com/franchise/demon-slayer
- My Hero Academia: https://animechrono.com/franchise/my-hero-academia
- Fullmetal Alchemist: https://animechrono.com/franchise/fullmetal-alchemist
- Sword Art Online: https://animechrono.com/franchise/sword-art-online
- Fate: https://animechrono.com/franchise/fate
- Monogatari: https://animechrono.com/franchise/monogatari
- JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: https://animechrono.com/franchise/jojos-bizarre-adventure
- Gundam: https://animechrono.com/franchise/gundam
- Evangelion: https://animechrono.com/franchise/evangelion
- Fairy Tail: https://animechrono.com/franchise/fairy-tail
- Hunter x Hunter: https://animechrono.com/franchise/hunter-x-hunter
- Spy x Family: https://animechrono.com/franchise/spy-x-family
- Chainsaw Man: https://animechrono.com/franchise/chainsaw-man
- Cowboy Bebop: https://animechrono.com/franchise/cowboy-bebop
